name: School Teacher Simulator
short_description: Become a teacher in a local school. Teach kids, but make sure that your students stay focused during the lesson and react if they misbehave. Each day has unique events. Living school environment with each teacher and student having their own personality.
detailed_description:
Become a teacher in a local school. Teach kids, but make sure that your students stay focused during the lesson and react if they misbehave. Stay focused during breaks if there are any problems between your pupils during school break. Each day has unique events like singing competition/ bus trip/ sports competition/ dramas around different places in school alongside your regular lessons/ school break monitoring.

Game Features:

  • Living school environment with each teacher/student having their own personality 

  • Solve conflicts between students during school break

  • Take part in school events like sports competition/bus trip...

  • You will get to know very rich story of one of your students and solve his problems

  • 7 days of a life of a teacher - each having different lesson for you to teach/ problems to solve and events to attend

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
